TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Leandro Barbosa unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzay mimaliay / mikilac zikuzay mimaliay. Leandro Barbosa i 2003 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 28, namapili' tu nu San Antonio Spurs putiput. 11 bulad 28 demiad, 1982 a mihca, Leandro Barbosa, miunduay.
S.PHON: r~ɾəandro barbosa unu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzaj mimar~ɾiaj / mikir~ɾaʦ zikuzaj mimar~ɾiaj. r~ɾəandro barbosa i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu san antonio spurs putiput. ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, r~ɾəandro barbosa, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Leandro Barbosa unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzay mimaliay / mikilac zikuzay mimaliay. Leandro Barbosa i 2003 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 28, namapili' tu nu San Antonio Spurs putiput. 11 bulad 28 demiad, 1982 a mihca, Leandro Barbosa, miunduay.
S.PHON: r~ɾəandro barbosa unu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzaj mimar~ɾiaj / mikir~ɾaʦ zikuzaj mimar~ɾiaj. r~ɾəandro barbosa i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu san antonio spurs putiput. ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, r~ɾəandro barbosa, miunduaj.
